info.name: CareLine360 – Doctor Dashboard API
info.description:
# CareLine360 – Doctor Dashboard API Documentation

Complete API documentation for the **Doctor Dashboard** module of CareLine360.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a **Bearer JWT** token in the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{doctorToken}}
```

### How to get a token
1. Use the **Auth → Login (Doctor)** request.
2. The `doctorToken` environment variable is auto-set by the post-response script.

## Base URL
```
{{baseUrl}} → http://localhost:1111
```

## Modules Covered
- **Authentication** – Login to obtain JWT
- **Profile Management** – Create, Read, Update profile & avatar
- **Dashboard & Analytics** – Stats overview & charts data
- **Availability Management** – CRUD time slots
- **Appointment Management** – List, update status, delete
- **Meetings** – Video-call appointments
- **Patient Management** – List patients, view details
- **Medical Records** – Create, list, update records
- **Prescriptions** – Generate PDF, save, list, download
- **Ratings & Reviews** – View ratings from patients
- **Chat** – Inbox, messages, mark as read, unread count
- **Account** – Delete account
- **Utility** – Trigger reminder, send test email

item.name: 01 – Authentication
item.description: Login as a doctor to obtain a JWT access token. The token is automatically stored in `{{doctorToken}}`.

request.description:
## POST /api/auth/login

Authenticate a doctor and receive JWT tokens.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `identifier` | string | ✅ | Email or phone number |
| `password` | string | ✅ | Account password |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOi...",
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOi...",
  "user": {
    "id": "664a...",
    "email": "doctor@example.com",
    "role": "doctor",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "isVerified": true
  }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | Validation error |
| 401 | Invalid credentials |
| 403 | Account not active |

## GET /api/auth/me

Get the currently authenticated user's basic info.

### Headers
| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Authorization | Bearer {{doctorToken}} |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "664a...",
    "email": "doctor@example.com",
    "phone": null,
    "role": "doctor",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "isVerified": true
  }
}
```

item.name: 02 – Profile Management
item.description: Create, view, update the doctor profile, and update avatar.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Dr. John Smith",
  "specialization": "Cardiology",
  "qualifications": ["MBBS", "MD Cardiology"],
  "experience": 10,
  "bio": "Experienced cardiologist specializing in interventional procedures.",
  "licenseNumber": "SLMC-12345",
  "consultationFee": 3500,
  "phone": "+94771234567"
}

request.description:
## POST /api/doctor/profile

Create a new doctor profile (one-time setup after registration).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only (Bearer token)

### Validation
- `fullName` – required, non-empty
- `specialization` – required, non-empty

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fullName` | string | ✅ | Doctor's full name |
| `specialization` | string | ✅ | Medical specialization |
| `qualifications` | string[] | ❌ | List of qualifications |
| `experience` | number | ❌ | Years of experience |
| `bio` | string | ❌ | Short biography |
| `licenseNumber` | string | ❌ | Medical license number |
| `consultationFee` | number | ❌ | Fee per consultation |
| `phone` | string | ❌ | Contact phone number |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Doctor profile created",
  "doctor": { ... }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | Validation failed |
| 403 | Not a doctor account / Account not approved |
| 409 | Profile already exists |

## GET /api/doctor/profile

Retrieve the logged-in doctor's profile.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "doctor": {
    "_id": "...",
    "userId": "...",
    "doctorId": "DOC-000001",
    "fullName": "Dr. John Smith",
    "specialization": "Cardiology",
    "qualifications": ["MBBS", "MD"],
    "experience": 10,
    "bio": "...",
    "licenseNumber": "SLMC-12345",
    "consultationFee": 3500,
    "phone": "+94771234567",
    "avatarUrl": "",
    "rating": 0,
    "totalRatings": 0,
    "availabilitySlots": [],
    "isDeleted": false,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor profile not found |

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Dr. John A. Smith",
  "specialization": "Interventional Cardiology",
  "qualifications": ["MBBS", "MD Cardiology", "FRCP"],
  "experience": 12,
  "bio": "Senior interventional cardiologist with 12+ years of experience.",
  "consultationFee": 4000,
  "phone": "+94771234567"
}

request.description:
## PUT /api/doctor/profile

Update the doctor profile. Only allowed fields are updated (whitelist).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Allowed Fields
`fullName`, `specialization`, `qualifications`, `experience`, `bio`, `licenseNumber`, `consultationFee`, `phone`

### Request Body
Send only the fields you want to update.

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Profile updated",
  "doctor": { ... }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor not found |

## PUT /api/doctor/profile/avatar

Upload/update profile picture using a base64-encoded image string. The image is uploaded to Cloudinary (max 2 MB, auto-cropped to 512×512).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Validation
- `image` – required, non-empty base64 data URI

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `image` | string | ✅ | Base64-encoded data URI (e.g. `data:image/jpeg;base64,...`) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Avatar updated",
  "avatarUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/..."
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | No image data / Image too large / Invalid format |
| 404 | Doctor not found |

item.name: 03 – Dashboard & Analytics
item.description: Dashboard overview stats and detailed analytics data for charts.

request.description:
## GET /api/doctor/dashboard

Get high-level dashboard statistics for the logged-in doctor.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "doctor": {
    "id": "...",
    "doctorId": "DOC-000001",
    "fullName": "Dr. John Smith",
    "specialization": "Cardiology",
    "avatarUrl": "https://...",
    "rating": 4.5,
    "consultationFee": 3500
  },
  "stats": {
    "totalAppointments": 120,
    "pendingAppointments": 5,
    "completedAppointments": 100,
    "todayAppointments": 3,
    "totalPatients": 45,
    "totalRecords": 95
  }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor profile not found |

## GET /api/doctor/analytics

Detailed analytics data for dashboard charts (monthly trends, status breakdown, completion rate).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "stats": {
    "totalAppointments": 120,
    "pendingAppointments": 5,
    "completedAppointments": 100,
    "cancelledAppointments": 10,
    "confirmedAppointments": 5,
    "totalPatients": 45,
    "completionRate": 83
  },
  "doctor": {
    "rating": 4.5,
    "totalRatings": 30
  },
  "thisMonthAppointments": 15,
  "lastMonthAppointments": 20,
  "appointmentsByStatus": [
    { "_id": "completed", "count": 100 },
    { "_id": "pending", "count": 5 },
    { "_id": "confirmed", "count": 5 },
    { "_id": "cancelled", "count": 10 }
  ],
  "monthlyTrend": [
    { "month": "Nov", "count": 18 },
    { "month": "Dec", "count": 22 },
    { "month": "Jan", "count": 15 },
    { "month": "Feb", "count": 20 },
    { "month": "Mar", "count": 25 },
    { "month": "Apr", "count": 15 }
  ]
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor not found |

## GET /api/doctor/availability

Retrieve all availability slots for the logged-in doctor.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "slots": [
    {
      "_id": "664a...",
      "date": "2026-04-15",
      "startTime": "09:00",
      "endTime": "09:30",
      "isBooked": false,
      "appointmentId": null
    }
  ]
}
```

## POST /api/doctor/availability

Add one or more availability time slots.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Validation
- `slots` – required, must be a non-empty array

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slots` | array | ✅ | Array of slot objects |
| `slots[].date` | string | ✅ | Date in YYYY-MM-DD format |
| `slots[].startTime` | string | ✅ | Start time (HH:mm) |
| `slots[].endTime` | string | ✅ | End time (HH:mm) |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Slots added",
  "slots": [ ... ]
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | slots must be a non-empty array |
| 404 | Doctor not found |

## PUT /api/doctor/availability/:slotId

Update the time range of an existing (unbooked) slot.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `slotId` | The `_id` of the availability slot subdocument |

### Validation
- `startTime` – required, non-empty
- `endTime` – required, non-empty
- `endTime` must be after `startTime`

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `startTime` | string | ✅ | New start time (HH:mm) |
| `endTime` | string | ✅ | New end time (HH:mm) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Slot updated",
  "slots": [ ... ]
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | Cannot edit a booked slot / End time must be after start time |
| 404 | Doctor not found / Slot not found |

## DELETE /api/doctor/availability/:slotId

Delete an unbooked availability slot.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `slotId` | The `_id` of the availability slot |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Slot deleted",
  "slots": [ ... ]
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | Cannot delete a booked slot |
| 404 | Doctor not found / Slot not found |

item.name: 05 – Appointment Management
item.description: List, filter, update status, and delete appointments.

request.description:
## GET /api/doctor/appointments

Get paginated list of the doctor's appointments with optional filters.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results per page |
| `status` | string | – | Filter by status: `pending`, `confirmed`, `completed`, `cancelled` |
| `date` | string | – | Single date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `dateFrom` | string | – | Range start (inclusive) |
| `dateTo` | string | – | Range end (inclusive) |
| `search` | string | – | Search by patient name |

> **Note:** `dateFrom`/`dateTo` takes priority over `date` if both are provided.

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "appointments": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "patient": { "_id": "...", "email": "patient@example.com", "phone": "..." },
      "patientProfile": { "fullName": "Jane Doe", "patientId": "PAT-000001", "avatarUrl": "..." },
      "doctor": "...",
      "date": "2026-04-15T00:00:00.000Z",
      "time": "09:00",
      "consultationType": "in-person",
      "status": "pending",
      "symptoms": "Chest pain",
      "notes": ""
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 50,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "pages": 5
  }
}
```

## PATCH /api/doctor/appointments/:appointmentId

Update the status (and optionally notes) of an appointment.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `appointmentId` | MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment |

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `status` | string | ✅ | New status: `confirmed`, `completed`, or `cancelled` |
| `notes` | string | ❌ | Optional doctor notes |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Appointment status updated",
  "appointment": { ... }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | Invalid status |
| 404 | Appointment not found |

## DELETE /api/doctor/appointments/:appointmentId

Permanently delete an appointment.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `appointmentId` | MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Appointment deleted successfully"
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Appointment not found |

## GET /api/doctor/meetings

Get all video-call type appointments for the doctor, enriched with patient profile data.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `status` | string | ❌ | Filter by status (e.g. `confirmed`, `pending`) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "meetings": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "patient": { "_id": "...", "email": "...", "phone": "...", "fullName": "..." },
      "patientProfile": {
        "userId": "...",
        "fullName": "Jane Doe",
        "patientId": "PAT-000001",
        "avatarUrl": "..."
      },
      "date": "2026-04-15T00:00:00.000Z",
      "time": "14:00",
      "consultationType": "video",
      "status": "confirmed",
      "meetingUrl": "..."
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: 07 – Patient Management
item.description: View the doctor's patients list and detailed patient info.

query.description: Search by name, patientId, or email

request.description:
## GET /api/doctor/patients

Get a paginated list of patients who have had appointments with this doctor.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 6 | Results per page |
| `search` | string | – | Search by name, patientId, or email |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "patients": [
    {
      "_id": "...(Patient doc _id)",
      "userId": { "_id": "...", "email": "patient@example.com", "phone": "..." },
      "fullName": "Jane Doe",
      "patientId": "PAT-000001",
      "avatarUrl": "https://...",
      "appointmentCount": 5,
      "lastVisit": "2026-04-10T00:00:00.000Z",
      "lastAppointmentId": "..."
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 15,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 6,
    "pages": 3
  }
}
```

## GET /api/doctor/patients/:patientId

Get detailed information about a specific patient, including their appointment history and medical records with this doctor.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only (must have an existing appointment with this patient)

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `patientId` | The Patient document `_id` (not `patientId` string) |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "patient": {
    "_id": "...",
    "userId": { "_id": "...", "email": "...", "phone": "...", "isVerified": true },
    "fullName": "Jane Doe",
    "patientId": "PAT-000001",
    "avatarUrl": "..."
  },
  "appointments": [ ... ],
  "records": [ ... ]
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 403 | No appointment with this patient |
| 404 | Patient not found |

item.name: 08 – Medical Records
item.description: Create, read, and update medical records for patients.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patientDbId}}",
  "appointmentId": "{{appointmentId}}",
  "chiefComplaint": "Persistent chest pain for 3 days",
  "diagnosis": "Mild angina pectoris",
  "notes": "Recommend stress test and follow-up in 2 weeks",
  "vitals": {
    "bloodPressure": "130/85",
    "heartRate": 78,
    "temperature": 37.1,
    "oxygenSaturation": 98,
    "weight": 72,
    "height": 175
  },
  "prescriptions": [
    {
      "medicine": "Aspirin 100mg",
      "dosage": "1 tablet",
      "frequency": "Once daily",
      "duration": "30 days",
      "instructions": "Take after meals"
    },
    {
      "medicine": "Atorvastatin 20mg",
      "dosage": "1 tablet",
      "frequency": "Once daily at night",
      "duration": "30 days",
      "instructions": "Take before bed"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
## POST /api/doctor/records

Create a new medical record for a patient. If `appointmentId` is provided, the appointment status is automatically set to `completed`.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `patientId` | ObjectId | ✅ | Patient document `_id` |
| `appointmentId` | ObjectId | ❌ | Linked appointment (auto-completes it) |
| `chiefComplaint` | string | ❌ | Main complaint |
| `diagnosis` | string | ❌ | Diagnosis |
| `notes` | string | ❌ | Clinical notes |
| `vitals` | object | ❌ | Vital signs (see below) |
| `prescriptions` | array | ❌ | Embedded prescriptions |

#### Vitals Object
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bloodPressure` | string | e.g. "120/80" |
| `heartRate` | number | BPM |
| `temperature` | number | Celsius |
| `oxygenSaturation` | number | SpO2 % |
| `weight` | number | kg |
| `height` | number | cm |

#### Prescription Object (embedded)
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `medicine` | string | Medicine name & dose |
| `dosage` | string | Dosage info |
| `frequency` | string | How often |
| `duration` | string | How long |
| `instructions` | string | Special instructions |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Medical record created",
  "record": { ... }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor / Patient not found |

## GET /api/doctor/records/:patientId

Get paginated medical records for a specific patient (only records created by this doctor).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `patientId` | Patient document `_id` |

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results per page |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "records": [ ... ],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 5,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "pages": 1
  }
}
```

## PUT /api/doctor/records/:recordId

Update an existing medical record. Only allowed fields are updated.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only (must be the record creator)

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `recordId` | Medical record `_id` |

### Allowed Fields
`chiefComplaint`, `diagnosis`, `notes`, `vitals`, `prescriptions`

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Record updated",
  "record": { ... }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor not found / Record not found |

item.name: 09 – Prescriptions
item.description: Generate PDF prescriptions, save, list, and download.

request.description:
## POST /api/doctor/prescriptions/generate

Generate a PDF prescription, upload to Cloudinary, save the record, and stream the PDF as a download.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `patientId` | ObjectId | ✅ | Patient document `_id` |
| `medicines` | array | ✅ | At least one medicine |
| `appointmentId` | ObjectId | ❌ | Linked appointment |
| `medicalRecordId` | ObjectId | ❌ | Linked medical record |
| `notes` | string | ❌ | Additional notes |

### Response (200)
- **Content-Type:** `application/pdf`
- **Content-Disposition:** `attachment; filename="prescription-PatientName.pdf"`
- **Custom Headers:**
  - `X-File-Url` – Cloudinary URL of the uploaded PDF
  - `X-Prescription-Id` – MongoDB `_id` of the saved prescription

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | patientId and medicines required |
| 404 | Doctor / Patient not found |
| 500 | PDF generation failed |

## POST /api/doctor/prescriptions

Save a prescription record (without generating a PDF).

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `patientId` | ObjectId | ✅ | Patient document `_id` |
| `medicalRecordId` | ObjectId | ❌ | Linked medical record |
| `medicines` | array | ❌ | Array of medicine objects |
| `notes` | string | ❌ | Additional notes |
| `fileUrl` | string | ❌ | Pre-uploaded PDF URL |
| `publicId` | string | ❌ | Cloudinary public ID |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "message": "Prescription saved",
  "prescription": { ... }
}
```

## GET /api/doctor/prescriptions

Get a paginated list of prescriptions created by this doctor.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results per page |
| `patientId` | ObjectId | – | Filter by patient `_id` |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "prescriptions": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "doctorId": "...",
      "patientId": { "fullName": "Jane Doe", "patientId": "PAT-000001", "avatarUrl": "..." },
      "medicines": [ ... ],
      "fileUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/...",
      "notes": "...",
      "sentToPatient": true,
      "createdAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "pagination": { "total": 10, "page": 1, "limit": 10, "pages": 1 }
}
```

## GET /api/doctor/prescriptions/download

Proxy-download a prescription PDF from Cloudinary. Avoids CORS issues and forces `Content-Disposition: attachment`.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | string | ✅ | Cloudinary PDF URL |
| `filename` | string | ❌ | Download filename (default: `prescription.pdf`) |

### Security
- Only `*.cloudinary.com` URLs are allowed.
- Follows up to 5 redirects.

### Response (200)
- **Content-Type:** `application/pdf`
- **Content-Disposition:** `attachment; filename="prescription_JaneDoe.pdf"`
- Binary PDF stream

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | URL required / Invalid URL |
| 403 | URL not allowed (non-Cloudinary) |
| 502 | Upstream error / Too many redirects |

item.name: 10 – Ratings & Reviews
item.description: View patient ratings received by the doctor.

request.description:
## GET /api/doctor/ratings

Get paginated list of ratings and reviews received from patients.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results per page |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "averageRating": 4.5,
  "totalRatings": 25,
  "ratings": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "doctorId": "...",
      "patientId": { "fullName": "Jane Doe", "avatarUrl": "..." },
      "appointmentId": "...",
      "rating": 5,
      "review": "Excellent doctor, very thorough!",
      "createdAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "pagination": { "total": 25, "page": 1, "limit": 10, "pages": 3 }
}
```

item.name: 11 – Chat
item.description: Chat functionality used by doctors to communicate with patients.

request.description:
## GET /api/chat/inbox

Get the chat inbox – list of appointments with active chats, enriched with last message and unread count.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor or Patient

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "chats": [
    {
      "_id": "...(appointmentId)",
      "patient": { "_id": "...", "email": "...", "phone": "..." },
      "doctor": { "_id": "...", "email": "...", "phone": "..." },
      "date": "...",
      "status": "confirmed",
      "lastMessage": {
        "_id": "...",
        "senderId": "...",
        "senderRole": "patient",
        "content": "Hello doctor!",
        "isRead": false,
        "createdAt": "..."
      },
      "unread": 3
    }
  ]
}
```

## GET /api/chat/:appointmentId

Fetch paginated message history for a specific appointment chat. Also marks received messages as read.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor or Patient (must be part of the appointment)

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `appointmentId` | The appointment `_id` |

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 100 | Messages per page |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "messages": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "appointmentId": "...",
      "senderId": "...",
      "senderRole": "doctor",
      "content": "Hi! How are you feeling?",
      "isRead": true,
      "createdAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "pagination": { "total": 15, "page": 1, "limit": 100, "pages": 1 }
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 403 | Access denied |
| 404 | Appointment not found |

## PATCH /api/chat/:appointmentId/read

Mark all messages in an appointment chat as read by the current user.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor or Patient

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `appointmentId` | The appointment `_id` |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Messages marked as read"
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 403 | Access denied |
| 404 | Appointment not found |

## GET /api/chat/unread/count

Get total unread message count across all appointment chats for the current user.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor or Patient

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "unreadCount": 7
}
```

## GET /api/doctor/public

🔓 **No authentication required.**

Get a public list of active doctors. Used by patients to browse and select doctors.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results per page |
| `specialization` | string | – | Filter by specialization |
| `search` | string | – | Search by name or specialization |

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "doctors": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "fullName": "Dr. John Smith",
      "specialization": "Cardiology",
      "experience": 10,
      "bio": "...",
      "rating": 4.5,
      "totalRatings": 25,
      "consultationFee": 3500,
      "avatarUrl": "https://...",
      "doctorId": "DOC-000001"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": { "total": 20, "page": 1, "limit": 10, "pages": 2 }
}
```

## DELETE /api/doctor/account

⚠️ **DANGER ZONE** – Permanently deletes the doctor profile and user account.

Medical records, appointments, and prescriptions are preserved for compliance.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Account permanently deleted"
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 404 | Doctor profile not found |

## GET /api/doctor/trigger-reminder

Manually trigger the meeting reminder check. Useful for testing without waiting for the cron job.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Reminder check triggered. See server console for logs.",
  "todayVideoAppointments": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "date": "2026-04-10T00:00:00.000Z",
      "time": "14:00",
      "status": "confirmed",
      "patientEmail": "patient@example.com",
      "meetingUrl": "https://..."
    }
  ]
}
```

## POST /api/doctor/test-email

Send a test email to the logged-in doctor's email address to verify SMTP configuration.

### Authorization
🔒 Doctor only

### Response (200)
```json
{
  "message": "Test email sent to doctor@example.com"
}
```

### Error Responses
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| 400 | No email address on account |
| 500 | SMTP error |
